references.text: Steenis, CGGJ van. 1949. Saururaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 47-48

species.citation: (Lour.) Baill. , Adansonia, 1st Sér. 10 (1871) 71 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 2; Steenis, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1949) 48; ≡ Spathium chinense Lour. , Fl. Cochinch. (1790) 217.
species.distribution: China, Japan, Philippines, Taiwan. LUZON: Albay, Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Mountain Province, MINDORO.
